name: King Cash Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: King Cash Pawn & Jewelry operates eight locations across South Florida, offering pawn loans, item sales, and in-house financing with rates starting at 3% monthly (36% APR).
description_long:
King Cash Pawn & Jewelry is a regional pawn shop chain operating eight locations throughout South Florida. The company positions itself as a customer-friendly alternative in the pawn industry, emphasizing accessibility through multilingual staff (English, Spanish, and Creole) and online services. Founded on the premise of fair valuations and respectful service, the company has maintained an A+ rating and developed a mobile app ecosystem for customer convenience.

The company offers three primary financial services: pawn loans (collateral-based short-term lending), item sales (buying jewelry, electronics, tools, and musical instruments for cash), and point-of-sale financing through their MobilePawn platform. Their pawn loans have a 61-day minimum repayment period with no maximum cap, with monthly interest rates beginning at 3% (36% APR). They advertise paying 95% of gold value for precious metals and offer free online appraisals. Their financing product allows customers to shop now and pay later with 0% interest for up to 6 months (restrictions apply), requiring only employment verification and a bank account.

Key differentiators include their emphasis on fair pricing (95% gold value claim), multilingual customer service, online appraisal capability, and the MobilePawn mobile app enabling remote payment management and pawn renewal. They actively promote community presence with eight physical locations and provide accessibility accommodations for low-vision users on their website. The company emphasizes speed (same-day cash for sales and pawns) and convenience through digital channels.

However, King Cash Pawn & Jewelry operates within the inherent constraints of pawn lending: 3-36% monthly interest rates (36% APR base) significantly exceed traditional lending products, though they remain competitive within the pawn industry. The financing product's 0% APR promotion has restrictions not fully detailed on the main website. As a regional operator limited to South Florida, they lack national coverage. While positioned as customer-friendly, pawn shops fundamentally require collateral surrender and carry inherent risks of item loss.
pros: Pays 95% of gold value, explicitly competitive pricing claim
Eight South Florida locations with multilingual staff (English, Spanish, Creole)
Free online appraisal tool available on website
MobilePawn mobile app for remote payment, renewal, and extension management
No maximum repayment period on pawn loans (minimum 61 days)
Same-day cash available for pawns and item sales
0% APR financing option available for up to 6 months (qualifying customers)
A+ rating maintained and accessibility accommodations for low-vision users
cons: Base interest rate of 3% monthly (36% APR) is high relative to personal loans and credit alternatives
Limited geographic footprint (South Florida only) with no national presence
0% APR financing requires job and bank account verification; restrictions apply but not detailed on homepage
Pawn model requires surrendering physical collateral with risk of non-redemption
No transparent disclosure of assessment methodologies or appeal processes for valuations
best_for: South Florida residents needing immediate cash for collateral they own (jewelry, electronics, instruments, tools)
Individuals with urgent short-term liquidity needs who cannot qualify for traditional credit
Sellers looking to liquidate unwanted items quickly for cash
Spanish or Creole-speaking customers seeking culturally accessible financial service
diagnosis: Best suited for South Florida residents with owned collateral who need same-day cash and cannot access traditional credit; they may accept collateral risk and 36% APR as trade-off for speed and accessibility. Primary caveat: pawn interest rates are substantially higher than personal loans or credit union products, and collateral forfeiture risk increases over extended repayment periods.
services: Pawn loans with 3% monthly interest starting rate (61-day minimum, no maximum repayment period)
Item sales (purchase of gold, diamonds, watches, musical instruments, electronics, tools)
Pawn renewal and extension (by paying accrued interest)
Point-of-sale financing (0% APR up to 6 months, restrictions apply)
MobilePawn mobile app for payment management and pawn administration
